title: stelis suinii
intro: Stelis suinii, also known as the Monkey Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Its health benefits include the treatment of fever, colds, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as a wound healing agent and an anti-itch remedy. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
